imageGen.style: Vintage newspaper engraving illustration, editorial style. Single focal object drawn in fine black ink lines and cross-hatching on a TRANSPARENT background. No background fill, no white box, no color. Pure ink drawing of the subject only. The subject:

knownIncidents: A pgMustard API key was leaked into a GitHub PR comment when an AI agent posted testing output as part of testing the new \explain share pgmustard feature in rpg v0.8.0. The key was quickly spotted by @NikolayS and rotated. Write this as a short SECURITY article with dry wit — cautionary tale, not catastrophe.
